We need to continue raising resources to keep this campaign fighting through November 6th -- can you chip in $5 or more today to help?](https://secure.bobcasey. Congressional Republicans already know where I stand -- make no mistake about it. When they pushed an anti-middle-class tax scheme that rewarded the top 1%, I voted in the best interests of middle-class families. When they tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act last year, I fought back, stopping millions from having their health care stripped away. subject: How I'm working to earn your support

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, and I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180916_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180916_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180916_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grids and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate earlier this month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico.** The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.

**And I 'm standing up to President Trump's cynical attempt to force consumers to bailout uncompetitive coal and nuclear power plants. **In a blatant effort to keep his campaign promises, the president is claiming a national security emergency to keep coal-fired plants open. But the truth is there is no national security emergency, and this artificial bailout will increase energy costs and leave businesses and households paying higher electric bills. I am going to keep fighting against this bailout and any attempt to drag us back on energy, and I will continue to push for modernizing and diversifying our energy grid.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn't happen, we need to reach our weekend fundraising goal by bringing in $5,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the midnight deadline?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180916_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180916_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180916_1_1")_**

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: Something our opponents can never buy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The closer we get to winning, the more intense this race is going to get.
So far, we’ve risen up to meet our opponents’ attacks with immense grit
and determination. But now, we’re not just up against Ted Cruz: we’re up
against ten outside groups that have pledged to spend in Texas against
Beto. We don’t know exactly what attacks will come next -- but we need to
be ready to overcome them.

The best way to fight back is through meaningful, person-to-person contact
with voters. That’s why we’re asking you to come back to Texas in the
final, most critical part of this election -- even though you’re in
another state. We know it’s a lot to ask, but it could make a huge
impact.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20180916&t=1001&akid=10473%2E444211%2ENj9eZ6 ]If you think you might be able to take the leap and join us here in
Texas, please fill out this form.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=em20180916&t=1002&akid=10473%2E444211%2ENj9eZ6 ]Come back to Texas

If coming to Texas is 100% not possible for you (which we understand!),
you can still help by gathering folks in your community to make calls for
Beto. [ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=em20180916&t=1003&akid=10473%2E444211%2ENj9eZ6 ]Just sign up to host a phone bank, and we’ll get you all the info
and support you need.

This weekend, our amazing volunteer network shattered our previous voter
contact records. It fills my heart to see what we can achieve when we work
together. That’s something our opponents can never buy. And it’s exactly
how we’re going to win.

Tomorrow marks 50 days left in this election. Let’s make every day count.

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

This means we have a lot of room to move forward and that with a strong effort over the final 51 days, we can send Steve King packing. We’re going all out to win, and putting in the work to reach as many voters as humanly possible between now and Nov. 6th! But to do that, we need your help —= Voters are sick and tired of Steve King’s politics of ineffectiveness and division, and his refusal to be held accountable. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: About the Debate...
body:
** Folks,

We just had our first debate with Tom Emmer, and it unfortunately will not be aired until October 21st. That's alright, because as members of #TeamTodd, you can read a bit about it first.

We talked about healthcare. I began with the tragic story of Alec, who aged off his parents’ healthcare and passed away due to lack of insulin. He just couldn't afford it. Tom countered by saying the United States has a wonderful health care system and that all countries with state funded care are languishing.

This was the general thrust of the debate. Tom would call my position pure lies and rhetoric and immediately start on false narratives carefully constructed in conservative think tanks. He spoke of how important bipartisanship is, yet didn't seem interested in the bipartisan issues, like protecting social security and Medicare for all, I brought up. He told us that people feel safer and more economically secure today than two years ago, and unless I've been campaigning in the wrong district, that indicates tone deafness unbecoming of a good representative.

There is a lot to unpack from this debate, and while I hate to play negative politics, I feel it necessary to bring up some of the misinformation and outright lies that came from Tom Emmer. I was told that Walmart employees in the district are in fact doing quite well, not in need of any SNAP benefits or any type of welfare, and are somehow on the track to 6 figure incomes when I said we need to tax companies like Walmart and Amazon for placing their employees on starvation wages and expecting the government to pick up the slack. I couldn't help thinking about the six figure restaurant tips Tom claimed all the servers were making years ago. I really think Emmer may be blind to the income inequality in the 6th, and that may be the most important reason to vote him out. He will never listen to what he refuses to look at.

We'll have more debates in the future, and I hope we can talk more about the BWCA and his irresponsible MINER act, climate change, and criminal justice reform. There's much that needs to be discussed, and I hope we can get many more (earlier playing!) debates as time presses on. Until then, thank you all so much for the donations and support. Keep up the fight by donating, sharing us on Facebook, and making sure everyone you know is planning to vote!

Also, we all deeply apologize for thinking the debate would play today. That wasn't KSTP's mistake, it was ours.

| | Derek, it's my job to watch the numbers - and to start getting worried when we need to be worried. **We 're now more than halfway through September, which means we're running out of time to fundraise this quarter. _I 'm officially worried._**

We're going to check in on [Tuesday](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ed/3e0906/7301d5b8/3e360a49/3165637732/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180916_2_FR_JN_MMD-jenny-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Tuesday&utm_campaign=20180916_2_FR_JN_MMD-jenny-LDND&source=20180916_2_FR_JN_MMD-jenny-LDND") to make sure we have the $52,500 more we were aiming for, and that we are on track to raise what we need to by [October 1st ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11ed/3e0906/7301d5b8/3e360a48/3165637732/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180916_2_FR_JN_MMD-jenny-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+October+1st+&utm_campaign=20180916_2_FR_JN_MMD-jenny-LDND&source=20180916_2_FR_JN_MMD-jenny-LDND")to keep running this program. Big news, team:

I met with some donors last week, and they are so fired up about Pennsylvania's Senate race that they're going to [**_match every online donation up to $15,000_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180916_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500").

This is huge: ever since Bob took a stand against President Trump's Supreme Court nominee and the corrupt, corporate special interests that picked him, national Republicans have doubled-down on trying to flip this Senate seat for the GOP. Just last month, President Trump came to Pennsylvania to campaign for Bob's opponent, raising an estimated _$1 million_ in the process. And earlier this week, _CNN_ laid out Democrats' narrow path to taking the Senate majority, and it depends on us winning here in Pennsylvania. This administration knows losing their Senate majority would stop them from implementing even more of their anti-middle-class agenda, and flipping this seat is their insurance policy.

[**_That's why we have to take advantage of this match opportunity: Republican donors have their eyes on Pennsylvania this year, so we have to maximize every possible dollar of grassroots support. Can you chip in $5 to fight back today?_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180916_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

We can't afford to miss this $15,000 goal, it's too important. Congressman Lou Barletta stood on stage in Wilkes-Barre last month and asked Pennsylvania voters to help him help President Trump -- not to help ordinary Pennsylvanians that are trying to make ends meet. He's putting his message on thousands of TVs across the state, showcasing his close relationship with the president. That's not the type of leader Pennsylvanians need in the Senate.

**Bob will continue to stand up to this administration when they side with corporations over people with pre-existing conditions and programs like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, but he needs your help to do it. What can you give to help us meet our $15,000 match goal?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. Simone
